user_query: On fathers greek inspired day, delete the second lunch option
full_query: DELETE(/Root/MealPlan_Version[1]/Person[atom(content =~ "Father")]/Day[agg_exists(Breakfast/Meal[atom(content =~ "greek inspired")]) OR agg_exists(Lunch/Meal[atom(content =~ "greek inspired")]) OR agg_exists(Dinner/Meal[atom(content =~ "greek inspired")])]/Lunch/Meal[2])
xpath_query: /Root/MealPlan_Version[1]/Person[atom(content =~ "Father")]/Day[agg_exists(Breakfast/Meal[atom(content =~ "greek inspired")]) OR agg_exists(Lunch/Meal[atom(content =~ "greek inspired")]) OR agg_exists(Dinner/Meal[atom(content =~ "greek inspired")])]/Lunch/Meal[2]
